title: Getting Started with Claude Code
headline: Essential Skills for New Claude Code Users
description: The best starter skills for developers new to Claude Code — carefully curated to get you productive in your first session.
intro: New to Claude Code? These skills give you immediate value. From basic code generation to file management, debugging helpers, and workflow automation — this collection covers the fundamentals every Claude Code developer needs.

title: Top AI Agents & Agentic Skills
headline: The Best Agentic AI Skills on SkillsForge
description: Curated collection of the highest-rated agentic AI skills — skills that can plan, execute multi-step tasks, use tools, and work autonomously on your behalf.
intro: Agentic skills go beyond single-turn assistance. These skills can plan tasks, use external tools, browse the web, write and execute code, and complete multi-step workflows with minimal supervision. This collection showcases the best of what AI agents can do.

title: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Tools
headline: Best MCP Skills and Integrations
description: The top Model Context Protocol skills — connecting Claude Code to databases, APIs, file systems, and external services through standardized tool interfaces.
intro: MCP (Model Context Protocol) is the standard for giving AI agents access to external tools and data sources. This collection features the best MCP-compatible skills that extend what Claude Code can access and automate.

title: Automation & Workflow Skills
headline: Top Skills for Automating Repetitive Work
description: Skills that automate your most repetitive workflows — from n8n automation to CI/CD pipelines, scheduled tasks, and multi-step business process automation.
intro: Stop doing the same tasks repeatedly. This collection features skills that automate workflows, connect services, schedule tasks, and build automated pipelines — so you can focus on the work that actually requires human judgment.

title: SEO & Search Optimization Skills
headline: Best Claude Code Skills for SEO
description: The top AI skills for SEO — technical audits, keyword research, content optimization, structured data generation, and programmatic SEO workflows.
intro: Search engine optimization requires both technical precision and content strategy. This collection brings together the best skills for auditing sites, optimizing content, generating structured data, and building SEO-driven content at scale.

title: Developer Productivity Boosters
headline: Skills That 10x Developer Productivity
description: Handpicked skills that have the highest impact on developer productivity — from fast code generation to smart autocomplete, git helpers, and project scaffolding.
intro: The most productive developers aren't working harder — they're using better tools. This collection features skills that provide the highest return on time invested: cutting boilerplate, automating repetitive tasks, and accelerating the slow parts of your workflow.

title: Creative Design & UI Skills
headline: Top AI Skills for Designers and UI Developers
description: The best Claude Code skills for creative work — UI component generation, design system scaffolding, CSS/Tailwind helpers, and design-to-code workflows.
intro: Design and development are converging. This collection features skills that bridge the gap — generating UI components from Figma designs, scaffolding design systems, writing accessible Tailwind CSS, and creating polished interfaces from natural language descriptions.

title: Community Favorites
headline: Most-Starred Skills on SkillsForge
description: The most popular and highest-starred Claude Code skills as voted by the SkillsForge community — battle-tested, well-documented, and widely trusted.
intro: These are the skills the community keeps coming back to. Sorted by GitHub stars and real-world usage, this collection represents the best the SkillsForge community has built and vetted — perfect starting points for any Claude Code workflow.

title: Security & DevOps Essentials
headline: Essential Skills for Security and DevOps Teams
description: The top skills for security and DevOps engineers — vulnerability scanning, CI/CD automation, secrets management, container security, and infrastructure hardening.
intro: Security and reliability require constant vigilance. This collection brings together the best skills for scanning vulnerabilities, automating secure deployments, managing secrets, hardening containers, and monitoring infrastructure — so your team can ship fast without sacrificing security.

title: Writing & Content Creation
headline: AI Skills for Writers and Content Teams
description: The best skills for content creation — blog writing, marketing copy, email campaigns, social media content, and brand voice maintenance.
intro: Great content takes time to craft. This collection features skills that accelerate every stage of the content lifecycle: ideation, drafting, editing, repurposing, and publishing — so your team publishes more without burning out.
